repo.description: Protein language model trained on coding DNA

terms.context_snippet: This repository encapsulates all code required to reproduce the results of the paper ["Codon language embeddings provide strong signals for use in protein engineering"](https://www.nature.com/articles/s42256-024-00791-0), by Carlos Outeiral and Charlotte M. Deane.
